package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for bootstrap_builds_clients_inside_route_registration: Startup code that hides dependency construction inside route registration functions.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule010NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule010NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule010NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario010Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule010NegativeService, input Rule010NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
